topic.title: Pairing a VEN on Linux
topic.shortdesc: Install and activate the Virtual Enforcement Node on a Linux-based workload.

ol.li: Log in to the PCE Web Console and navigate to Infrastructure > Workloads.
Generate a pairing script using the Pair with Script option.
Copy the command and execute it on your target Linux host with root privileges.

section.title: Verification
section.p: After the script completes, verify that the workload appears in the Workloads list with a status of Active.
